description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their handbags are creatively engineered to cater to the woman of today. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leatherette handbag. With classy stitch detailing, this bag in black makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas one roomy zipped compartment and an inner zipped compartmentBuckle design on the front, a quilted design all over the bag and brand name embossed on a small placard looped through the metallic buckle on the frontMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 31 cmWidth: 22 cm
